name: 04-19-phase3-candidate-signals-recall
title: Phase 3: Candidate Confirmation, External Signals, Recall Loop
description: Implement the three critical missing features that differentiate MemexFlow from Cubox AI: (3A) Candidate confirmation flow, (3B) External signal discovery, (3C) Proactive knowledge recall. See prd.md for detailed requirements.

subtasks.name: 3A: Candidate Confirmation
subtasks.description: Add status column to captures, stop auto-chaining extraction, add confirm/ignore UI

subtasks.name: 3B: External Signals
subtasks.description: Add channel adapters (RSS, GitHub releases), signal_discoveries table, discovery capture flow

subtasks.name: 3C: Recall Loop
subtasks.description: Add recalls table, recall heuristic job, recall page with revisit/dismiss actions
